invariant_definition: Unconditioned by *upādhi* — the Advaita technical category for the highest reality. *Nirupādhika brahman* is *brahman* in itself, beyond the *upādhi*-borne distinctions of *jīva*-Īśvara-jagat. *Nirupādhika* and *nirguṇa* are essentially co-extensive in Advaita.

per_school.definition: *Nirupādhika brahman* = *nirguṇa brahman* = the *pāramārthika* truth; the ultimate object of *brahma-jñāna*.
